asset_strategy.primary_goal: Drive waitlist sign-ups by showcasing engineering precision and colourway exclusivity for the Cradle Adapter V1.
asset_strategy.creative_priority: Precision specs + visual transformation (pocket to wrist).
asset_strategy.why_this_asset_mix_wins: Balances technical trust (exact fit, material quality) with desire (colourway variation, wrist transformation). Minimum viable set ensures fast production while maximizing conversion impact.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with Royal Pop case snapping into place, side view.
image_blueprint.purpose: Instantly communicate the product’s core function and premium fit.
image_blueprint.composition: Centered, tight crop on adapter and case. Royal Pop case partially inserted to show engagement.
image_blueprint.lighting: Soft diffused lighting with subtle rim light to emphasize FKM texture and retaining lip.
image_blueprint.background: Neutral gradient (light gray to white) to keep focus on product.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Case at 45-degree angle, adapter slightly tilted to reveal retaining lip.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% reserved for hook text ('40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Exact fit.').
image_blueprint.notes: Hero frame for both still and motion. Must be render-ready for HERO_PUSH_IN.

image_blueprint.subject: Exploded technical diagram of Cradle Adapter V1 with callouts for 40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, 22mm lugs, and FKM material.
image_blueprint.purpose: Provide engineering credibility and reinforce exact fit.
image_blueprint.composition: Isometric view, clean white background, minimalist callouts with precise measurements.
image_blueprint.lighting: Flat even lighting to ensure clarity of text and lines.
image_blueprint.notes: Source for SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION. Must be vector-based for animation.

image_blueprint.subject: All five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso) in a single grid layout.
image_blueprint.purpose: Showcase exclusivity and design variety to drive colourway preference.
image_blueprint.composition: 5x1 grid, each colourway centered with identical framing. Subtle shadow to imply depth.
image_blueprint.lighting: Consistent soft lighting across all swatches to ensure accurate colour representation.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Top-down view, adapter slightly angled to show retaining lip.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Bottom 10% reserved for colourway labels (e.g., 'Arctic Blue').
image_blueprint.notes: Source for COLOUR_REVEAL. Must be rendered in one pass for consistency.

image_blueprint.subject: Royal Pop on wrist with Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome), side profile.
image_blueprint.purpose: Demonstrate wearability and transformation (pocket to wrist).
image_blueprint.composition: Wrist at 30-degree angle, watch face slightly tilted to show retaining lip and strap integration.
image_blueprint.lighting: Natural diffused lighting with subtle highlights on FKM texture.
image_blueprint.background: Soft bokeh (neutral tones) to keep focus on wrist.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter fully engaged, strap adjusted to show 22mm lug width.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: None (full frame used for visual impact).
image_blueprint.notes: Source for WRIST_FIT_DEMO. Must be shot manually for authenticity.

image_blueprint.subject: Macro shot of 0.7mm retaining lip and FKM rubber texture.
image_blueprint.purpose: Highlight engineering precision and material quality.
image_blueprint.composition: Extreme close-up, shallow depth of field to emphasize texture and lip.
image_blueprint.lighting: Raking light to accentuate FKM texture and retaining lip.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter tilted to show lip cross-section.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: None (full frame used for macro detail).
image_blueprint.notes: Source for MACRO_SWEEP. Must be rendered or shot with macro lens.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with Royal Pop case, top-down view.
image_blueprint.purpose: Clean cover frame for Reel and social posts.
image_blueprint.composition: Centered, top-down view with slight shadow for depth.
image_blueprint.lighting: Soft diffused lighting, no harsh shadows.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Case fully seated in adapter, crown aligned at 12 o’clock.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% reserved for hook text (e.g., 'Royal Pop. Now on your wrist.').
image_blueprint.notes: Alternative cover if IMG-01 is too tight for platform requirements.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Royal Pop case slowly snaps into adapter (0.5s), then holds for 1s. Adapter remains static.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow push-in (1.5s) from medium close-up to tight close-up, then hold for 1s. Smooth zoom-out (1s) to reveal full adapter.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on adapter for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: A premium FKM rubber watch adapter (Monochrome) with a Royal Pop case snapping into place. Side view, 45-degree angle. Soft diffused lighting with subtle rim light. Neutral gradient background. Camera pushes in smoothly to reveal the 0.7mm retaining lip and 40.35mm case fit. No motion blur. Hyper-realistic texture. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, overexposed, underexposed, floating objects, chaotic movement, dramatic whip pans, fake cinematic effects, heavy particles, aggressive transitions.
motion_blueprint.notes: Hero clip for Reel. Must align with hook text ('40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Exact fit.').

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Exploded view components (adapter, case) drift apart (1s), then reassemble (1s). Callouts for 40.35mm, 0.7mm lip, and 22mm lugs animate in sequentially (2s).
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Static camera, slight zoom-in (0.5s) during callout animation.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on final frame for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Isometric exploded view of a Cradle Adapter V1 and Royal Pop case. Clean white background. Components drift apart smoothly, then reassemble. Callouts for 40.35mm inner socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and 22mm lug width animate in with precise measurements. Minimalist design, no distractions. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, chaotic movement, floating random objects, aggressive transitions, overcrowded labels, 3D artifacts.
motion_blueprint.notes: Engineering proof clip. Must sync with script lines ('40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.').

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Each colourway (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso) fades in sequentially (0.5s per colour), then holds for 1s. Adapter remains static.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Static camera, slight zoom-in (0.5s) during colour transitions.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on Otto Rosso for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: A 5x1 grid of Cradle Adapter V1 colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso). Top-down view, consistent framing. Soft diffused lighting. Each colourway fades in smoothly, revealing FKM rubber texture. Neutral light gray background. No motion blur. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, inconsistent lighting, colour bleeding, misaligned frames, chaotic transitions.
motion_blueprint.notes: Colourway showcase clip. Must sync with script lines ('Five colourways. One adapter.').

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Royal Pop case snaps into adapter (0.5s), then wrist rotates 90 degrees (1s) to show side profile. Strap adjusts slightly (0.5s) to demonstrate 22mm lug width.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Static camera, slight push-in (0.5s) during snap-in.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on side profile for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: A wrist wearing a Royal Pop watch with Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome). Side profile, 30-degree angle. Natural diffused lighting. Adapter snaps into place, then wrist rotates smoothly to show retaining lip and strap integration. Soft bokeh background. No motion blur. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, overly posed wrist, distracting background elements, chaotic movement.
motion_blueprint.notes: Transformation clip. Must sync with script line ('Pocket watch to wrist in seconds.').

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Adapter remains static. 0.7mm retaining lip and FKM texture are highlighted with subtle light sweep (1s).
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow pan (2s) from left to right, focusing on lip and texture.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on final frame for 0.5s, then cut to CTA.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Extreme macro shot of a Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) retaining lip and FKM rubber texture. Raking light accentuates texture. Black background. Camera pans slowly from left to right, revealing the 0.7mm lip and crown notch. No motion blur. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, overexposed, underexposed, chaotic movement, floating objects.
motion_blueprint.notes: Material proof clip. Optional if Reel duration is tight.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Royal Pop case snaps into adapter (0.5s), then holds.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Static camera, slight zoom-in (0.5s) during snap-in.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold on adapter for 0.5s, then fade to CTA text.
motion_blueprint.prompt: A premium FKM rubber watch adapter (Monochrome) with a Royal Pop case snapping into place. Side view, 45-degree angle. Soft diffused lighting. Neutral gradient background. Camera zooms in slightly to emphasize the snap. No motion blur. 8K resolution.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, distorted, low quality, chaotic movement, aggressive transitions.
motion_blueprint.notes: Alternative CTA support clip if VID-05 is omitted.

asset_dependencies.reason: HERO_PUSH_IN requires the HERO image as source.
SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION requires the TECHNICAL_BOARD image as source.
COLOUR_REVEAL requires the COLOURWAY_CARD image as source.
WRIST_FIT_DEMO requires the WRIST_SHOT image as source.
MACRO_SWEEP requires the DETAIL_MACRO image as source.
COVER_TO_MOTION_TRANSITION requires the HERO image as source.

missing_assets.why_needed: Authenticity and wearability proof. Rendered wrist shots lack realism.
missing_assets.impact_if_missing: Reduced trust in fit and wearability. May require fallback to rendered wrist shot.

build_order.why_first: Core assets for VID-01 and VID-02, which are required for the Reel hook and proof points.
Required for VID-03, which showcases colourway exclusivity (key for waitlist demand).
Highest priority for authenticity. Must be completed before VID-04 can be produced.

build_order.action: Render IMG-05 (DETAIL_MACRO) or shoot manually if time allows.
build_order.why_first: Useful for material proof but lower priority than wrist shot.

build_order.action: Produce VID-01, VID-02, VID-03, and VID-04.
build_order.why_first: Minimum viable Reel requires these four clips to cover hook, proof, desire, and transformation.

build_order.action: Produce VID-05 and VID-06 if time/budget allows.
build_order.why_first: Optional upgrades for additional proof and CTA support.

handoff_for_visual_brief.editing_note: Sync VID-01 with hook text ('40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Exact fit.'). Use VID-02 to reinforce specs during script lines. Keep pace fast (1-2s per clip) but slow down for key specs (e.g., 40.35mm). End with VID-04 to emphasize transformation and CTA.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
